_readme: Character voice manifest for voices.mjs. THE ONE RULE: never change a character's voice_id — every line a character ever speaks must come from the same voice. Add lines freely; add characters by picking an UNUSED stock voice (GET /v1/voices).

mercy.voice_desc: weathered woman ~50, dry wit, southern rasp — Madison ('wise old lady - mother, grandma, aunt': older American female, wise/dry, closest stock match to a trader who has seen everything)

lines.greet: Jack talks. What are you buying?
lines.trusted: There you are. Kept the good shelf stocked for you.
lines.refuse: Not to you. Not after what you did.

bridger.voice_desc: gravelly older man, tired authority — Bill ('Wise, Mature, Balanced': old American male, crisp and worn, reads like a security chief who is done arguing)

lines.work: Got a lurker problem by the water point. Twenty-five jack for its head.
lines.refuse: Meridian doesn't work with your kind. Walk away.

sam.voice_desc: laconic younger man, flat calm — Will ('Relaxed Optimist': young American male, chill/level delivery, right for a hired gun who never raises his voice)

lines.hire: Forty jack and my gun walks where you walk.
lines.wheel: Your wheel. I'll watch the mirrors.

radio.voice_desc: wasteland DJ, mid-Atlantic AM-radio crackle energy — Callum ('Husky Trickster': middle-aged character/animation voice, husky and theatrical, the showman-through-static sound)

lines.blood_moon: Blood moon tonight, children. The dark comes all the way down.
lines.war: War in the heartland. Keep your tank full and your dog close.
